BcSim<br><span style="font-size: 13px; color: rgb(71, 85, 105);">self echo suppressed by remembering own write offsets</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="760" x="252.5" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7ed;strokeColor=#fb923c;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>demo command set</b><br/><br/><font face="monospace">cmd:setLeds</font> &nbsp;8-bit mask<br/><font face="monospace">cmd:getLeds</font> &nbsp;request<br/><font face="monospace">cmd:setKey</font> &nbsp;counted bytes<br/><font face="monospace">cmd:logState</font> &nbsp;local effect<br/><font face="monospace">cmd:divide</font> &nbsp;2 floats<br/><font face="monospace">abc:LedsState</font> / <font face="monospace">DivideResult</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="235" x="435" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e9f5c9;strokeColor=#84cc16;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>stamp routing demo</b><br/><br/><font face="monospace">low stamp bits select:</font><br/><font face="monospace">0x0001 → N7_bi</font><br/><font face="monospace">0x0002 → N8_bi</font><br/><font face="monospace">0x0004 → N9_bi</font><br/>ABC still broadcasts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="245" x="720" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>Node roles</b><br/><br/><span style="display:inline-block;border:2px solid #eab308;border-radius:999px;padding:2px 14px;background:#fef3c7;">tx</span> &nbsp; send only<br/><span style="display:inline-block;border:2px solid #38bdf8;border-radius:999px;padding:2px 14px;background:#dbeafe;">rx</span> &nbsp; receive only<br/><span style="display:inline-block;border:2px solid #22c55e;border-radius:999px;padding:2px 14px;background:#d1fae5;">bi</span> &nbsp; both directions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="185" x="210" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#38bdf8;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=15;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=8;" broadcast simulation byte bus (BcSim)
abc.bus (abc.log)

div.div:
demo command set
cmd:setLeds 8-bit mask
cmd:getLeds request
cmd:setKey counted bytes
cmd:logState local effect
cmd:divide 2 floats
abc:LedsState / DivideResult
